home.tagline: Ask nature. Build with your hands.
home.description: Your child solves one real problem every week — with design thinking, nature's secrets, and home materials. Ages 8+.

paint.heading: Do you like animals? We can paint them together

curriculum.heading: A curriculum, not random videos
curriculum.sub: Every mission follows the design-thinking spine:
curriculum.note: Tools are taught once, practiced for weeks, then owned for life — your child finishes the year with a real creative toolbox.
curriculum.path_line1: Year 1 · Toolbox 🧰 → Year 2 · Studio mastery 🎓 → Year 3 · Real impact 🌍
curriculum.path_line2: 🤠 Explorer → 🛠️ Maker → 💡 Inventor → 🚀 Innovator → 🥇 Master → 🧑‍🏫 Mentor

items.q: I'm a teacher — is it free?

cta_band.heading: Your kid's first invention could be this week.

hero.heading: The Idea Pop Method
hero.subhead: A structured creative curriculum built on biomimicry and maker education.

why.heading: Why we built it
why.body: Screen time is here to stay. We built Idea Pop so kids use it to solve, build, and think — not just consume. Every minute on Idea Pop ends with something made.

cycle.heading: One cycle, every week
cycle.body: SEE a nature clip → LEARN from an expert → SOLVE with home materials. Same rhythm, new topic, every week.

what_you_see.heading: What you'll actually see
items: A weekly mission email with what to gather at home
A 3–5 min nature clip your child watches first
An expert walkthrough in the Library
A build challenge with photo submission
XP, badges, and a growing Ideas Wall portfolio

for_teachers.hero_heading: Idea Pop is free for your class.
for_teachers.hero_sub: Weekly creative missions, zero grading, set up in 5 minutes.
safe_items: School-consent model — parents get an info email, not a blocker
Class gallery is visible to your class only
Kids join with nickname + code — no emails, no photos of faces
No ads, no DMs, human-reviewed content

challenge.header_sub: “Today's Mission Is To Help Max Cross The River!”
challenge.brief_lead: Here, You'll Face Lots Of Fun Challenges And Exciting Missions!
challenge.brief_body: Sometimes You'll Come Up With Ideas To Solve A Problem, And Sometimes You'll Learn New Things First So You Can Create Your Own Creative Solution. Every Mission Is A New Chance To Think, Create, And Try Out Fresh Ideas. So, Are You Ready To Jump Into The World Of Ideas? 🚀
challenge.idea_placeholder: Do You Have Any Idea? Write It Here...
challenge.noidea_lead: If you don't have any idea,
challenge.noidea_body: We can find amazing ideas to solve Max's problem by getting inspired by nature. Would you like to go on an adventure together into the depths of nature and discover creative solutions along the way? 🌿✨
challenge.brainstorm_lead: What's on your mind, Idea Pop Ai can help to Brain storm...
challenge.brainstorm_placeholder: Let's brain storm to help Max...
challenge.cta_3: many ways to play and learn
challenge.locked_card_aria: Challenge {index} — locked. Ask a grown-up to upgrade.
challenge.locked_card_title: Upgrade Idea Pop to unlock everything
challenge.upgrade_modal_body: More missions unlock with Idea Pop premium. A parent completes the upgrade on their own account — you can't be charged here.
challenge.load_error: Could not load this mission. Please try again.

ideas_wall.locked_body: The wall opens after you share your own idea — no peeking 😉

ideas_wall.restricted_share: A grown-up needs to turn on sharing first

five_whys.title: 5 Whys ❓
five_whys.desc_young: Ask WHY five times to find the real problem!
five_whys.desc_older: Dig to the root cause by asking WHY five times.

exploring.title: Exploring Animals and Plant
exploring.invertebrates_desc: Invertebrates are animals that do not have a backbone, like insects, jellyfish, and worms. They come in many shapes and sizes and live all around us, from the ocean to your backyard!
exploring.vertebrates_desc: Vertebrates are animals that have a backbone, like fish, birds, and mammals. They can live in many different places, from deep oceans to forests and even near our homes!
exploring.cta_3: many ways to play and learn
exploring.footer_heading: We can create a better world together with your Ideas

classifier.title: Machine Trainer 🤖
classifier.subtitle: Teach a tiny machine brain to tell your pictures apart — just like real AI scientists!
classifier.privacy: 🔒 Your photos stay on this device. Nothing is ever uploaded.
classifier.loading: Downloading the tiny brain… this happens once and can take a moment.
classifier.load_error: Hmm, the brain didn't download. Check your internet and try again.
classifier.examples_hint: Add lots of DIFFERENT photos to each team — variety makes the machine smart!
classifier.example_count: {count, plural, =0 {no examples yet} =1 {1 example} other {# examples}}
classifier.camera_error: No camera? No problem — you can train with the upload buttons instead.
classifier.test_hint: Show it a NEW picture it has never seen, then tell it the real answer to keep score.
classifier.need_examples: Teach every team at least one example first!
classifier.score_empty: No graded guesses yet — quiz the machine to build your score!
classifier.preview_alt: The quiz photo you showed the machine
classifier.panel_hint: Train it right here — your photos never leave this device.

hints.intro: Hints won't spoil the fun — each one nudges you a little closer.
hints.all_shown: That's every hint — you've got this! 💪

helper.intro: Stuck on this step? Ask Popi the penguin a question — he only knows about this mission step.
helper.privacy: A grown-up can always read your questions and answers.
helper.placeholder: e.g. Why does my bridge keep falling?
helper.blocked: I can only help with this mission step! Let's get back to it — what part are you working on? 🐧
helper.rate_limited: That's a lot of questions! Popi needs a little rest — try again soon. ⏳
helper.not_allowed: Popi isn't switched on for you yet — ask a grown-up to turn it on. 🗝️
helper.error: Hmm, Popi couldn't answer right now. Try again in a moment!

shell.upgrade_body: Unlock full access to the Idea Pop platform

mission.got_it_secret: Got it — show me the secret →
mission.secret_biomimicry_note: This is the design principle engineers call biomimicry
mission.skill_none: No specific skill needed — you're ready!
mission.skill_toast: Opens the Library — come back when done! 📖
mission.sketch_photo_prompt: 📷 Sketch or photo — projects, not faces
mission.build_check_2: Ask a grown-up if you need scissors or tools
mission.build_check_3: Find a safe place to work and test
mission.wall_post_note: Your idea will be checked by a grown-up before others can see it.
mission.wall_review_note: 🛡 Reviewed by a grown-up before appearing
mission.popi_coming_soon: Coming soon — Popi is being trained!
mission.audience_public_sub: Ask a parent to unlock this
mission.audience_safety: 🛡 Grown-ups check public posts before others can see them
mission.wall_load_error: Could not load ideas. Please try again.
mission.wall_empty: No ideas yet — be the first! 🌟
mission.sketch_instruction: Draw it on paper, then take a photo — or just describe it in words. A photo is optional.

help_panel.title: How this works
help_panel.body_profile: This is your profile — your XP, badges, and the projects you've made all live here.
help_panel.body_explore: Watch short nature videos and earn XP. Tap any card to start watching.
help_panel.body_library: Pick a studio, follow an expert course, or make something quick with simple materials.
help_panel.body_challenge: Missions turn a real problem into 8 fun steps. Pick one and start building!
help_panel.body_studio: Train the computer to see! Show it examples, then test what it learned — all on your device.
help_panel.body_mission: You're on a mission! Follow the steps at the top. Stuck? Tap “Ask Popi” on the Skill or Build step for a hint.
help_panel.body_default: Explore, learn, and build — and earn XP along the way. Tap around to get started!
